title: Kunchikal Falls
tagline: Kunchikal Falls — heritage city of Karnataka

overview.short: Kunchikal Falls is a waterfall in India located in the Nidagodu village near Yadur-Masthikatte in the Shimoga district of Karnataka state.
overview.description: Kunchikal Falls is a waterfall in India located in the Nidagodu village near Yadur-Masthikatte in the Shimoga district of Karnataka state. The waterfall cascades down rocky boulders and the total height of the falls is 455 meters (1,493 feet), according to the World Waterfall Database. Kunchikal Falls is formed by the Varahi River. After the construction of the Mani Dam near Sulagodu and an underground power generation station near Hosangadi, Udupi district, the water flow to the falls has greatly reduced and is visible only during the rainy season (July-Sept).

topPlaces.name: Hulikal
topPlaces.description: Hulikal is a village located in the Hosanagara taluk of the Shimoga district in the Indian state of Karnataka and is known for its heavy rainfall. The Hulikal village lies in the Western Ghat (Paschima ghatta in Kannada) region of Karnataka state.

topPlaces.name: Thombattu
topPlaces.description: Thombattu is a village in Kundapura Taluk in Karnataka, India. It is in the Udupi district.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kunchikal Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kunchikal Falls is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kunchikal Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mangaluru International Airport (83 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (94 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kunchikal Falls?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kunchikal Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kunchikal Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Kunchikal Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kunchikal Falls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Hulikal, Thombattu, Masthikatte.
